name: persona-dialog-eval
description: Persona-dialog evaluation for conversational agents. Hold a case (with fixed ground-truth labels) constant and vary only the speaker — persona (rude, nervous, arrogant, technical, clueless, non-technical) and language — then have an LLM play that speaker in a real dialog with the actual agent and score its emitted decision (category / team / intent / severity) per persona and language. Scaffolds a complete eval/ (reusable scoring engine + dialog runner + enforced anti-fabrication driving CLIs + guarding unit tests), generates a committed corpus, and produces an accuracy report with a per-expected-value breakdown and a miss list.
